Resume

Mykhaylo Orlov

Vienna, Austria
📧 mishaorlov1000@gmail.com
🔗 LinkedIn

Profile

A motivated Data Science student specializing in data analysis, machine learning, and applied mathematical modeling. Strong interest in environmental systems, climate science, and computational social science.

Proven ability to work independently and in teams, with strong problem-solving skills and experience handling data-driven research projects under time constraints.

Education

Central European University (CEU), Vienna

BSc in Data Science and Society
Sep 2023 – Expected Jun 2026
GPA: 3.89 / 4.00

  • Focus areas: Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Programming, Climate Science
  • Strong foundation in statistical modeling, machine learning, and computational methods

Higher School of Economics (HSE), Moscow

BSc in World Economy
Sep 2021 – Sep 2022
GPA: 8.68 / 10

Work Experience

BIOMIN Holding GmbH (dsm-firmenich)

Intern – Biostatistical Team
May 2025 – June 2026 (expected)

  • Supported statistical analysis for biological research projects
  • Developed Python automation tools for animal trial analysis
  • Contributed to R package development for metabolomics data processing
  • Improved efficiency of biological data workflows and decision-making

Higher School of Economics (HSE), Moscow

Teaching Assistant – History of Economic Doctrine
Apr 2022 – Sep 2022

  • Assisted in teaching and grading academic assignments
  • Supported course delivery and student engagement
